Name: files
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."files" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."department_files" f WHERE f."file_id" = "storage"."files"."id" AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."departments" "f1" WHERE f."department_id" = "f1"."id" AND "f1"."name" = $1::text)) LIMIT 5) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.bucket"."bucket" AS "bucket", "_root.r.department_file"."department_file" AS "department_file") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.bucket.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."buckets" WHERE "_root.base"."bucket_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.bucket.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "bucket" FROM "_root.r.bucket.base") AS "_root.r.bucket" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department_file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "file_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department_file.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.r.department_file.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "department_file" FROM "_root.r.department_file.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department_file.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.r.department_file.base"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department_file.r.department.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.r.department_file.r.department.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files"."files" AS "files") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.department_file.r.department.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files"), '[]') AS "files" FROM (WITH "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.r.department_file.r.department.base"."id" LIMIT 3) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files" FROM "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files.base") AS "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files") AS "_root.r.department_file.r.department.r.files" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.department_file.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.department_file" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
